sub_fields.default_value: Build digital products that your customers love.

sub_fields.label: Hero Description
sub_fields.name: hero_description
sub_fields.default_value: Nexora is a full-service digital agency helping ambitious teams design, build, and scale modern web platforms — from positioning to production.

sub_fields.label: Hero Footer
sub_fields.name: hero_footer
sub_fields.default_value: Trusted by 200+ startups and Fortune-500 teams

sub_fields.label: Section Heading
sub_fields.name: section_heading
sub_fields.default_value: A team obsessed with craft and outcomes.

sub_fields.label: Section Description
sub_fields.name: section_description
sub_fields.default_value: We're a 24-person studio of designers, engineers and strategists scattered across 8 countries. For ten years we've shipped digital products for venture-backed startups and the world's biggest brands — and we still treat every project like our first.

sub_fields.label: CTA Section Description
sub_fields.name: cta_section_description
sub_fields.default_value: Tell us about your project. We respond within 4 business hours, every time.

sub_fields.label: Content Description
sub_fields.name: content_description
sub_fields.default_value: Can't find the answer you're looking for? Reach out to our team — we usually reply within a few hours.

sub_fields.label: Question
sub_fields.name: question
sub_fields.default_value: Do you work with non-technical founders?

sub_fields.label: Answer
sub_fields.name: answer
sub_fields.default_value: Yes — about a third of our clients are non-technical founders. We handle the engineering decisions while you focus on the product strategy. We translate the build process into plain language and keep you in the loop on every trade-off.

sub_fields.label: Section Title
sub_fields.name: section_title
sub_fields.default_value: Loved by founders and product leaders

sub_fields.label: Testimonial Review
sub_fields.name: testimonial_review
sub_fields.default_value: "Nexora rebuilt our entire onboarding in 6 weeks. Activation jumped from 38% to 71% and we haven't touched the design system since — it just keeps scaling with us."
